overall.description: Third-person exploration gameplay in an ancient Greek temple complex, featuring sunlit stone architecture, vine-covered pergolas, and Mediterranean coastal views. The player character walks through terraced gardens, visits a scenic overlook with a burning brazier, ascends temple stairs, and explores the clifftop sanctuary.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with vine pergola

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded pergola toward the coastal overlook

notable_agents.action: male and female civilians in ancient Greek clothing standing at the entrance
figures seated on benches under the pergola shade

entered.detail: vine-covered stone colonnade creating dappled shade on the walkway
dense flowering shrubs lining the stone retaining wall
wide stone staircase leading upward to temple terrace
terracotta storage vessels placed along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shaded stone pergola covered with flowering vines. The camera moves forward past civilians in ancient Greek attire, passing purple flowering bushes and large clay urns, heading toward a sunlit coastal overlook visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: clifftop overlook with panoramic sea view

events.description: exits the shaded pergola into open sunlight at the coastal overlook
camera pans right to reveal the coastal town and Mediterranean sea below

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook admiring the coastal scenery and burning brazier

entered.detail: large bronze fire bowl with flames on stone pedestal overlooking the coast
panoramic vista of ancient town, harbor, and blue Mediterranean sea
brown wooden railing marking the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the pergola into bright sunlight, the scene opens to a dramatic clifftop overlook. A burning brazier sits on a stone pedestal while the camera pans to reveal a sweeping view of the coastal settlement and blue sea below, framed by cypress trees and rocky cliffs.

events.description: turns away from the overlook and re-enters the pergola walkway
begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: walking back through the pergola then climbing the temple stairs toward the entrance

entered.detail: returning to the vine-covered walkway from the overlook
ancient Greek temple with stone columns and triangular pediment
large emerald banner with owl symbol hanging between temple columns
large emerald banner with owl symbol hanging between temple columns

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the coast, the camera re-enters the shaded pergola and approaches a grand stone staircase. Ascending the steps reveals an imposing temple entrance flanked by two large green banners bearing owl symbols, with terracotta flower urns at the base of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple terrace with side pathways and rock formations

events.description: moves from the temple entrance to the side terrace with rock walls
turns along narrow path between rock walls and planters

agents.ego_description: examining the temple entrance then exploring the side pathways along the rock wall

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing under the pergola near a stone table

entered.detail: tall natural stone cliff face forming the terrace boundary
rectangular planters with purple flowers along the rock wall
red fabric awning providing shade over the side walkway

segments.scene_description: At the temple summit, the camera explores the side terraces, passing NPCs gathered under a pergola near a stone table. The path winds between tall rock walls and wooden planters filled with purple flowers, with a red canopy providing shade over the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with statue and coastal overlook

events.description: returns to open terrace area with view of the sea
passes by the robed female statue while approaching the terrace edge

agents.ego_description: walking past the statue toward the terrace edge to view the coast

notable_agents.action: civilian in robes walking along the terrace

entered.detail: tall stone statue of a woman in flowing green robes on circular pedestal
flaming fire bowl on stone pedestal near the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: Returning to the open upper terrace, the camera passes a prominent statue of a robed female figure in green. The scene reveals another burning brazier and panoramic coastal views, with civilians walking along the terrace and the sea visible in the distance beyond the palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shaded garden pergola to a dramatic clifftop overlook and finally to the elevated terraces of a grand temple. It begins beneath flowering vines and purple bushes, moving past civilians and clay urns toward a bright opening in the architecture. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the scene expands to reveal a burning brazier and a sweeping panoramic view of a coastal settlement and the blue sea below. The perspective then turns back toward the shade to ascend a grand stone staircase flanked by owl-symbol banners, leading through a winding path of red canopies and wooden planters. Finally, the camera opens onto the upper terrace, passing a robed female statue and another burning brazier to reveal a final, wide vista of the distant sea and palm trees.
